full_prompt: Design a monolithic 6061-T6 aluminum brake-pedal-box mount plate for a collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark / FSEast 2026 Class 1 CV vehicle running FS Rules 2026 base. The mount plate bolts to the front bulkhead and carries the pivoting brake pedal, two Tilton 78-series master cylinders, and a pedal-position sensor. Per FS Rules 2026 T.4.8, the brake pedal must be designed to withstand a pedal force of at least 2000 N without any failure of the brake system or pedal box. Plate is a single machined 6061-T6 billet (no welds, no bolted gussets). Geometry: plate 240 mm wide x 180 mm tall x 8 mm thick, top edge integrated with a 40 mm tall x 240 mm x 6 mm wall vertical stiffener lip, bottom edge clean. Pedal-pivot boss: integral 20 mm OD x 35 mm long cylindrical stub with M10 (10.5 mm clearance) through-bore, centered horizontally, 60 mm above the bottom edge. Two master-cylinder mounting holes: 9 mm (M8 clearance) each, horizontally spaced 90 mm, centered at 90 mm above the bottom, between the pivot boss and the stiffener lip. Six M6 (6.5 mm clearance) holes for front-bulkhead attachment arranged 2 rows x 3 columns on the back face on 100 mm x 80 mm pattern. One 12 mm cable pass-through hole for the pedal-position sensor harness. Overall bounding envelope 240 x 180 x 50 mm. Material 6061-T6 with E 68.9 GPa, nu 0.33, density 2700 kg/m^3, yield 276 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, endurance 97 MPa at 5e8 cycles. Three load cases. Load Case 1 (FS T.4.8 mandatory 2 kN pedal force): 2.0 kN horizontal force at the pedal pad (represented at a 200 mm pedal arm length upper tip, but the load reacts at the pivot and at the two master-cylinder pushrods distributed per a 3:1 pedal-ratio equalizer; at the mount plate this appears as 2.0 kN horizontally at the pivot boss reacted by two 500 N + 500 N + front-bulkhead bolts); for CAD/FEA simplicity apply 2.0 kN at the pivot boss horizontally toward the driver and 2.0 kN at each master-cylinder boss forward (total 4.0 kN forward at the two master-cylinder holes). The six bulkhead bolts are fully fixed. Load Case 2 (emergency panic brake at 3x FS rule = 6 kN): 6.0 kN scaled FS T.4.8 rule extension for emergency-braking safety margin, same direction as LC1. Load Case 3 (1 million-cycle fatigue service): 800 N pedal force per cycle (40% of LC1) representing typical endurance-event service, applied at the pivot boss and master-cylinder bosses in proportion. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 FS T.4.8, peak von Mises must not exceed 138 MPa (yield/2.0, FS T.4.8 brake-system safety allowable); (R2) under LC2 6 kN emergency, peak stress 184 MPa (yield/1.5 transient); (R3) under LC3 fatigue at 1e6 cycles, local stress range at any hole or fillet must not exceed 97 MPa; (R4) first six natural frequencies must exceed 80 Hz to decouple from driver foot-modulation frequencies 2-20 Hz and chassis harmonics <80 Hz; (R5) maximum deflection at the pivot boss under LC1 must not exceed 2.0 mm to preserve consistent brake pedal feel; (R6) plate mass must not exceed 0.9 kg. Thermal, fluid, buckling, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic 6061-T6 aluminum brake-pedal-box mount plate for a collegiate formula-class racecar (FS 2026, FSEast event). The plate is a single billet-machined 6061-T6 part with a top-edge stiffener lip, an integral pedal-pivot boss, two master-cylinder holes (Tilton 78-series, 3:1 pedal ratio), a cable pass-through, and six front-bulkhead attachment holes; no welds. Design per FS Rules 2026 T.4.8 (pedal must withstand a 2 kN force with no brake-system or pedal-box failure), using yield/2.0 and yield/1.5 (transient) safety factors.

Envelope: 240 x 180 x 50 mm (plate 8 mm thick with a 40 mm x 6 mm stiffener lip).

Load cases.
- LC1 T.4.8 mandatory 2 kN: 2.0 kN horizontal at the pivot boss plus 2.0 kN forward at each master-cylinder boss (total 4.0 kN forward at the two MC holes), six bulkhead bolts fixed.
- LC2 emergency panic brake (3x T.4.8 = 6 kN): same direction, scaled safety margin transient.
- LC3 1e6-cycle fatigue: 800 N pedal force (40% of LC1) spectrum at pivot and MC bosses.
Also check first six modes above 80 Hz (decouple foot-modulation 2-20 Hz and chassis <80 Hz) and pivot-boss deflection under LC1 below 2 mm.

prompt.title: FS Hungary brake pedal box mount plate
prompt.brief: Monolithic 6061-T6 plate 240x180x8 with integral pivot boss + 2 master-cyl holes + stiffener lip; FS T.4.8 2 kN pedal force rule.

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: Rigid tie to front bulkhead frame tube stresses

eval_coverage: FS T.4.8 mandatory 2 kN pedal force gate
